Hero.headline: Great talents don't happen by chance.
Hero.paragraph: We identify, evaluate and place elite talent from across the world into English clubs — through a rigorous process that clubs trust and players depend on.

clubs.title: Elite talent,
clubs.description: Long-term relationships. No speculative sends. No wasted trials. We only present players we are confident about — after a minimum 3-month evaluation.

players.title: Your path
players.description: We accept 7% of applicants. If we take you on, it means we believe in you. We guide every step — from first evaluation to signed contract and beyond.

paragraphs: We built Clearway on 30 years of elite sports experience — as an athlete, coach, and manager. Alongside world No.1s, Olympic champions, Wimbledon winners, and Premier League players.
What that experience taught us: the right environment, rigorous structure, and relentless work ethic are what separate a good player from an exportable one.
We are not scouts. We are not agents. We are international talent identification professionals who refuse to present a player until we are certain they are ready.

Process.intro: Every player goes through the same rigorous pathway. No shortcuts. No exceptions. The same standards that make clubs trust us are what make players succeed.

steps.title: Initial Assessment
steps.description: Application review. Honest briefing on requirements, process and realistic expectations from day one.

steps.title: Live Evaluation
steps.description: 3–5 matches, 3–5 training sessions. Assessment of attitude, character, lifestyle and full physical profile.

steps.title: Player Profile
steps.description: Trial video, physical data, medical records, academics and statistics — a complete professional dossier.

steps.title: Club Strategy
steps.description: Targeted club selection based on the player's exact profile. Direct presentations to the right clubs.

steps.title: Trial & Support
steps.description: Full trial coordination and ongoing support throughout the process — for the player and the family.

Evaluation.intro: English football is one of the most physically demanding environments in the world. These five pillars determine whether a player is truly ready.

cards.title: Technical
cards.description: First touch, passing precision and decision-making under pressure at high tempo.

cards.title: Tactical
cards.description: Positional discipline, reading of the game and ability to adapt to different systems.

cards.title: Physical
cards.description: Speed, endurance and recovery capacity. English football demands an absolute physical machine.

cards.title: Mental
cards.description: Competitive edge, resilience under pressure and professional standards on and off the pitch.

cards.title: Character
cards.description: Attitude, cultural eligibility, family environment and willingness to adapt.

Contact.formIntro: Whether you're a club looking for the right talent or a player ready to take the next step — we want to hear from you.

Footer.tagline: International talent identification and club recruitment. Built on elite experience. Driven by transparency.
